sections.paragraph:
ἀκριβεύομαι (περί τινος Sext. Emp., Math. 1, 71; pass. PAmh 154, 7 [VI a.d.]) in act. sense pay strict attention περὶ τῆς σωτηρίας B 2:10.—DELG s.v. ἀκριβής.

Sext. Emp. Sext. Emp. = Sextus Empiricus, II–III a.d.—List 5

Math Math = mathematician

pass. pass. = passive (either of grammatical form or of passive experience); also used in reference to literary portion=passage

PAmh PAmh = The Amherst Papyri I–II—List 4

act. act. = active

B B = Barnabas (the Letter of), II a.d., except in series of uncial witnesses, in which case B refers to Codex Vaticanus (s. also Vat.). When the abbrv. B would ambiguous, Vat. is used for the codex.—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 39
